creator: itojun@itojun.org
text:
new nvi-m17n was released.  it includes important bugfixes
	related to memory usage. (previous versions touched non-allocated
	memory regions)

Fix: please apply the following patch.
	and, please change japanese/nvi*, korean/nvi*, chinese/nvi*
	accordingly.  thanks!
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	(none)
